summary: Phase 2 enhancement testing completed successfully. All new features working: Course Detail screens (/course/[id]) with hero image, teacher link, schedule, description, and Join Class button. Teacher Detail screens (/teacher/[id]) with avatar, bio, stats, and courses list. Navigation flows work correctly: Home -> Course Detail -> Teacher Detail -> Course Detail. All course-teacher mappings verified correct. All 5 tabs still functional. Previous features (iteration 1) remain working.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings persist: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-critical, same as iteration 1.
expo-linear-gradient version mismatch warning (55.0.13 vs expected ~15.0.8). Non-critical, app works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Course Detail screen (/course/[id]) implemented correctly with all required elements
✓ Teacher Detail screen (/teacher/[id]) implemented correctly with all required elements
✓ Stack navigator properly wraps (tabs) group in root _layout.tsx
✓ Course and teacher detail screens registered as Stack screens with proper animations
✓ useLocalSearchParams used correctly to get dynamic route params
✓ Back buttons implemented with router.back() on both detail screens
✓ All navigation links use router.push() with correct paths
✓ Join Class button uses Alert.alert (works in native apps, not web preview - this is expected)
✓ Course-Teacher mapping verified correct in constants/theme.ts:
- Teacher 1 (Sumra): 5 courses (Darse Nizami, Chahal Hadith, Bahare Shariat, Tafseer, Sahabiyat)
- Teacher 2 (Firdos): 4 courses (Tajweed, Qirat, Nazra, Madni Qaida)
- Teacher 3 (Afnaz): 5 courses (Deeniyat, Farze Uloom, Muballigah, Urdu, Kids Deeniyat)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, Image)
✓ StyleSheet.create() used properly throughout
✓ All text wrapped in Text components
✓ Mobile-first design maintained with proper spacing and touch targets
✓ Hero images on course detail with LinearGradient overlay
✓ Teacher avatars with proper styling and badges
✓ Consistent Islamic theme colors throughout

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend in this UI-only app
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Phase 2 features working as expected

seed_data_creation: N/A - All data is hardcoded in constants/theme.ts as per requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 enhancement complete and tested. App now has Course Detail and Teacher Detail screens with full navigation. All 14 courses and 3 teachers have detail pages. Navigation flows: Home featured courses -> Course Detail, Courses tab Attend Class -> Course Detail, Course Detail teacher link -> Teacher Detail, Teacher Detail course links -> Course Detail, Teachers tab cards -> Teacher Detail. All back buttons work. Course-teacher mappings verified correct. Alert.alert on Join Class button works in native apps only (not web preview). App loads at https://islamic-learning-49.preview.emergentagent.com. Only minor deprecation warnings exist (same as iteration 1).
